data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Review status tracking (pending, approved, rejected, escalated)', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps do not include any checks or validations related to status tracking of bookings or compliance reviews. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of status tracking for bookings.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
